headline: TD Cowen Maintains Buy on Marathon Petroleum, Lowers Price Target to $315
summary: TD Cowen  analyst Jason Gabelman   maintains Marathon Petroleum (NYSE:MPC) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $320 to $315.

headline: Wall Street Lunch: Comcast Soars On Plan To Spin Off NBCUniversal
summary: Comcast (CMCSA) plans to separate into two independent publicly traded companies through a tax-free spinoff of NBCUniversal and Sky.
